mapped_layers.reason: Used for progress bars and monitoring execution progress.

used_in.call_expr:
Panel.fit(
                    step_logs
                    + f"Step [cyan]{self.name}[/cyan] completed. Cost: [green]${step_cost:.2f}[/green]",
                    title=f"[bold blue]Step Execution: {self.name}[/bold blue]",
                )
Panel("No operations in pipeline", title="Query Plan", width=100)

Panel.fit(
                "[bold cyan]Optimizer Configuration[/bold cyan]\n"
                f"[yellow]Sample Size:[/yellow] {self.sample_size_map}\n"
                f"[yellow]Max Threads:[/yellow] {self.max_threads}\n"
                f"[yellow]Rewrite Agent Model:[/yellow] {self.llm_client.rewrite_agent_model}\n"
                f"[yellow]Judge Agent Model:[/yellow] {self.llm_client.judge_agent_model}\n"
                f"[yellow]Rate Limits:[/yellow] {self.config.get('optimizer_config', {}).get('rate_limits', {})}\n",
                title="Optimizer Configuration",
            )

Panel(
                f"[bold red]Error:[/bold red] optimizer_config section is required in YAML for MOAR optimizer.\n\n"
                f"[bold]Example:[/bold]\n"
                f"[dim]{example_yaml}[/dim]\n\n"
                f"[yellow]Note:[/yellow] dataset_name is inferred from the 'datasets' section. "
                f"dataset_path can optionally be specified in optimizer_config, otherwise it's inferred from the 'datasets' section.",
                title="[bold red]Missing optimizer_config[/bold red]",
                border_style="red",
            )

Confirm.ask(
            "Do you want to proceed with inserting all documents as-is?",
            default=True,
            console=console,
        )

Status(
            status,
            console=self,
            spinner=spinner,
            spinner_style=spinner_style,
            speed=speed,
            refresh_per_second=refresh_per_second,
        )

Panel.fit(
                    "[bold cyan]Optimized Configuration for Merge[/bold cyan]\n"
                    "[yellow]Consider adding these parameters to avoid re-running optimization:[/yellow]\n\n"
                    f"blocking_threshold: {optimized_config.get('blocking_threshold')}\n"
                    f"blocking_keys: {optimized_config.get('blocking_keys')}\n"
                    f"blocking_conditions: {optimized_config.get('blocking_conditions', [])}\n",
                    title="Optimization Results",
                )

Panel.fit(
                        "[bold cyan]Optimized Configuration for Resolve[/bold cyan]\n"
                        "[yellow]Consider adding these parameters to avoid re-running optimization:[/yellow]\n\n"
                        f"blocking_threshold: {optimized_config.get('blocking_threshold')}\n"
                        f"blocking_keys: {optimized_config.get('blocking_keys')}\n"
                        f"blocking_conditions: {optimized_config.get('blocking_conditions', [])}\n",
                        title="Optimization Results",
                    )

Confirm.ask(
            f"Do you agree with the decomposition assessment? "
            f"[bold]{'Recommended' if should_decompose['should_decompose'] else 'Not recommended'}[/bold]",
            console=self.console,
        )

Panel.fit(
                comparison_content,
                title=f"[bold magenta]Pairwise Comparison: {plan1_name} vs {plan2_name}[/bold magenta]",
            )

Confirm.ask(
                "[yellow]Warning: No blocking keys or conditions specified. "
                "This may result in a large number of comparisons. "
                "We recommend specifying at least one blocking key or condition, or using the optimizer to automatically come up with these. "
                "Do you want to continue without blocking?[/yellow]",
            )

Confirm.ask(
                f"[yellow]Warning: {dropped_pairs} pairs will be dropped due to the comparison limit. "
                f"Proceeding with {limit_comparisons} randomly sampled pairs. "
                f"Do you want to continue?[/yellow]",
                console=self.console,
            )

Confirm.ask(
                "[yellow]Warning: No blocking keys or conditions specified. "
                "This may result in a large number of comparisons. "
                "We recommend specifying at least one blocking key or condition, or using the optimizer to automatically come up with these. "
                "Do you want to continue without blocking?[/yellow]",
                console=self.runner.console,
            )

Panel(
                            Group(
                                Text("Input:", style="bold cyan"),
                                Text(truncated_messages),
                                Text("\nOutput:", style="bold cyan"),
                                Text(str(output)),
                            ),
                            title="[bold green]LLM Call Details[/bold green]",
                            border_style="green",
                        )

rprint(
                    f"[bold red]Could not parse LLM output:[/bold red] {e.message}\n"
                    f"\tExpected Schema: {e.expected_schema}\n"
                    f"\tPlease manually set this output."
                )

Table(
        title="Experiment Results",
        box=box.ROUNDED,
        show_header=True,
        header_style="bold cyan"
    )

Table(
        title="Logical Fallacy Extraction Experiment Results",
        box=box.ROUNDED,
        show_header=True,
        header_style="bold cyan"
    )
console.print("[bold blue]Generating synthetic abstracts dataset...[/bold blue]")

console.print(f"[bold green]Budget performance plots saved to {output_filename}[/bold green]")
console.print(f"[bold green]Running budget tests on {dataset_name} dataset with {num_samples} samples[/bold green]")
console.print("[bold blue]Sorting squares with lotus top k method[/bold blue]")
console.print("[bold blue]Sorting medical transcripts with lotus top k method[/bold blue]")
console.print("[bold blue]Sorting number words with picky method[/bold blue]")
console.print("[bold blue]Generating synthetic paper abstracts with GPT-4o-mini[/bold blue]")
console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]===== Running SciFact Trial {trial+1}/{n_trials} =====[/bold magenta]\n")
console.print(f"\n[bold green]===== TESTING WITH {num_abstracts} ABSTRACTS =====[/bold green]")

Second paragraph.

With multiple.

        "id": [1, 2]
    })

        "doc_id": ["doc1", "doc1", "doc1", "doc2", "doc2"],
        "chunk_num": [1, 2, 3, 1, 2],
        "content": [
            "First chunk of document 1",
            "Second chunk of document 1", 
            "Third chunk of document 1",
            "First chunk of document 2",
            "Second chunk of document 2"
        ]
    })

litellm.completion(
                model=self.model,
                messages=messages,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
                azure=True,
                response_format=ExpandResponseFormat,
            )

litellm.completion(
        model=model,
        messages=messages,
        api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
        api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
        api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
        azure=True,
        response_format=ResponseFormat,
    )

completion(
                model=agent_llm,
                messages=message_history,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
                # api_key=os.environ["GEMINI_API_KEY"],
                azure=True,
                response_format=GleaningInstantiateSchema,
            )

completion(
                model=self.agent_llm,
                messages=self.message_history,
                response_format=AgentDecision,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
                azure=True,
            )

completion(
                model=agent_llm,
                messages=message_history,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
                # api_key=os.environ["GEMINI_API_KEY"],
                azure=True,
                response_format=ChainingInstantiateSchema,
            )

completion(
                model=agent_llm,
                messages=message_history,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
                # api_key=os.environ["GEMINI_API_KEY"],
                azure=True,
                response_format=ChangeModelInstantiateSchema,
            )

completion(
            model=model,
            messages=messages,
            response_format=json_schema_object,
            num_retries=3,
            temperature=1.0,
            max_tokens=500,
        )

completion(
            model=model,
            messages=messages,
            tools=tools,
            tool_choice={"type": "function", "function": {"name": "send_output"}},
            num_retries=3,
            max_tokens=500,
            temperature=1.0,
        )

completion(
                model=self.model,
                messages=messages,
                azure=True,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
                response_format={"type": "json_object"}
            )

completion(
                model=self.model,
                messages=messages + [{"role": "user", "content": request_msg}],
                azure=True,
                api_key=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_KEY"),
                api_base=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_BASE"),
                api_version=os.environ.get("AZURE_API_VERSION"),
